title: Lord Mayor of Leeds Pays Courtesy Visit to SEC Headquarters in Abuja - FinancialEDGE
description: The Lord Mayor of Leeds, United Kingdom, Councillor Abigail Marshall Katung, paid a courtesy visit to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) headquarters in Abuja on Wednesday. During the visit, she met with the Director General of SEC, Dr. Emomotimi Agama. This visit highlights the strengthening ties between the UK and Nigeria, particularly in the
html:
The Lord Mayor of Leeds, United Kingdom, Councillor Abigail Marshall Katung, paid a courtesy visit to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) headquarters in Abuja on Wednesday.

During the visit, she met with the Director General of SEC, Dr. Emomotimi Agama. This visit highlights the strengthening ties between the UK and Nigeria, particularly in the areas of finance and economic development.
